reforms.description: A special fund was established to support recovery efforts following a significant fire in Lisbon, aimed at revitalizing the affected area and promoting economic stability.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to restore economic activity and infrastructure in the affected area, which can lead to increased productivity and local economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: A special fund was set up in the wake of the fire that destroyed part of Lisbon.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the fund addresses a specific crisis, its impact is localized and does not represent a broad structural change in policy.
reforms.source_quote: For instance, a special fund was set up in the wake of the fire that destroyed part of Lisbon.
